THE_ARCHITECT.talk.OBERONPRETENDER-OBERO: A king who lends dreams and collects them at dawn. The Spire keeps its own ledgers, fae — and they balance to the last drop of blood.
Pass, then, little usurer. Borrow all you like on my floors. I am the one creditor you cannot charm.
Still selling the same sweet night? The Spire bought it once, and woke. It will not dream on your terms again.
Show me the worm beneath the wings, then. I have foreclosed on liars older than your betrayal.
